main.description: Records one side of a parent-child hierarchy relationship between communities. Each community stores their own record. A relationship is active only when both communities have a record referencing each other with status=approved.

role.description: Whether this community is the parent or child in this relationship

counterpartyDid.description: DID of the other community in this relationship

status.description: Status of this side of the relationship

requestedBy.description: DID of the admin who created this record (initiated or approved the relationship)
